title: Limited services by Consular Affairs Division tomorrow (24)
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Consular Affairs Division of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs will provide services only for 400 applicants on 24 June 2022 due to maintenance work at the premises of the Consular Affairs Division.
The Consular Affairs Division regrets any inconvenience caused in this regard, said a statement from the Foreign Ministry.
Country at risk of coming to grinding halt owing to delayed shipments
